seed_problem: Maximize total weight of satisfied clauses in a synthetic weighted CNF; checker computes satisfied weight / baseline.
mutation: composite: weighted Max-SAT over ride-direction boolean variables with a mixed positive-only/negative-only/mixed clause-polarity structure so the all-reverse baseline is weak and neither uniform assignment is good; scored against the all-reverse baseline weight.
title: Midway Reversal: Carnival Ride-Circuit Tuning
strategies: all-reverse baseline: emit n zeros (the calibration point, ratio 0.1)
weighted majority vote: set each ride independently to the polarity with the greater incident satisfied-request weight
sweep-based hill climbing: from the majority-vote start, repeatedly flip any ride whose flip increases total satisfied weight until a fixed point
randomized-restart local search: perturb the assignment and re-run hill climbing from several seeds, keeping the best circuit found
